name: Patient 44
history: History of recurring conflicts and strained relationships. Ongoing trust and boundary issues. Some relationships involve alcoholism. History of aggressive behavior.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
worthless_belief: I am bad - dangerous, toxic, evil
intermediate_belief: I drive people away because of my behavior and trust issues.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm destined to be alone because I'm fundamentally unlovable and toxic.
coping_strategies: Spending holidays alone, reflection on loneliness.
situation: Spending holidays alone and reflecting on feelings of sadness and loneliness.
auto_thought: No one wants to spend the holidays with me because I'm difficult and damaged.
behavior: Spend holidays alone while ruminating on loneliness.
